cookbook_cmd: omitted from standalone kernel task; use bench/workloads.json and docs/captured_kernel_api_shapes.json for RLCR
shape_capture_note: Captured 2026-07-07 on Verda B300 light-face-hides-fin-03-1 from a real zai-org/GLM-4.7-Flash TP=1 SGLang production-path execution in temporary container sglang-glm47-flash. Used a model-local HF cache after snapshot download, attention_backend=triton, reasoning_parser=glm45, tool_call_parser=glm47, disabled FlashInfer autotune, disabled CUDA graph prefill/decode, and marked four request windows covering long prefill, short decode, mid concurrency, and high concurrency. The attention task maps to the captured TritonAttnBackend forward APIs because this Flash path did not call the older unified_attention_with_output Python wrapper during the capture.
